data.title: Neuren Pharmaceuticals Updates on Share Buy-Back Program
data.description:
An update from Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited ( (AU:NEU) ) is now available.

Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced an update regarding its ongoing share buy-back program. As of the latest announcement, the company has repurchased a total of 1,641,514 ordinary fully paid securities, with an additional 9,177 securities bought back on the previous day. This buy-back initiative is part of the company’s strategy to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited

Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited operates in the pharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development of therapies for neurological disorders. The company is known for its research and development of treatments aimed at addressing unmet medical needs in the neurology sector.

data.title: NioCorp Elects Directors and Secures Shareholder Support at AGM
data.description:
NioCorp Developments ( (NB) ) has issued an update.

NioCorp Developments Ltd. announced the election results of its directors at the Annual General Meeting held in Denver, Colorado. All seven nominees were successfully elected to serve until the next annual meeting. Additionally, shareholders approved the appointment of Deloitte & Touche LLP as auditors and endorsed the executive compensation plan. This election and shareholder support may strengthen NioCorp’s governance and operational strategies as it continues to develop its Elk Creek Project, potentially impacting its market position and stakeholder confidence.

More about NioCorp Developments

NioCorp Developments Ltd. is focused on developing a critical minerals project in Southeast Nebraska, known as the Elk Creek Project. The company aims to produce niobium, scandium, and titanium, and is also exploring the potential to produce rare earth elements. These materials are essential for various industries, including automotive, aerospace, and electronics, due to their applications in creating strong, lightweight alloys and advanced magnets.

YTD Price Performance: 15.79%

Average Trading Volume: 286,162

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $84.74M

data.title: Banco de Sabadell Approves Key Financial Agreements and Reactivates Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Banco de Sabadell ( (ES:SAB) ) has issued an announcement.

Banco de Sabadell held its Ordinary General Shareholders’ Meeting where several key agreements were approved, including the annual accounts and management report for 2024, the non-financial and sustainability information statement, and a new shareholder remuneration policy. Additionally, a significant decision was made to reactivate a share buyback program worth up to 247 million euros, aiming to reduce share capital and enhance shareholder value by increasing profit per share. This move is expected to positively impact the company’s financial structure and shareholder returns.

More about Banco de Sabadell

Banco de Sabadell is a prominent financial institution operating in the banking industry, offering a range of financial services including personal and corporate banking, investment services, and wealth management. The company focuses on serving both individual and business clients, with a strong presence in the Spanish market.

data.title: GoGold Resources Secures C$75 Million for Project Development
data.description:
GoGold Resources ( (TSE:GGD) ) has issued an update.

GoGold Resources Inc. has announced a C$75 million bought deal financing agreement with a syndicate of underwriters led by BMO Capital Markets. The proceeds will be used for the development of the Los Ricos South project, exploration activities at both Los Ricos South and North projects, and general corporate purposes. This financing is expected to bolster GoGold’s operational capabilities and enhance its project development in Mexico, potentially strengthening its position in the silver and gold production industry.

More about GoGold Resources

GoGold Resources is a Canadian-based silver and gold producer focused on operating, developing, exploring, and acquiring high-quality projects in Mexico. The company operates the Parral Tailings mine in Chihuahua and has the Los Ricos South and Los Ricos North exploration and development projects in Jalisco. Headquartered in Halifax, Nova Scotia, GoGold is building a portfolio of low-cost, high-margin projects.

YTD Price Performance: 67.07%

Average Trading Volume: 157,611

data.title: SHF Holdings Expands Vision to Support Cannabis Industry
data.description:
SHF Holdings ( (SHFS) ) has provided an update.

On March 13, 2025, SHF Holdings held a special meeting where CEO Terrance Mendez outlined the company’s strategic vision. Safe Harbor plans to expand its services beyond compliance solutions to include a broader array of products aimed at supporting cannabis businesses. The company aims to capitalize on the projected growth of the US cannabis industry, which is expected to exceed $76 billion by 2030. Recent financial adjustments, including modifying debt terms and reducing costs, are intended to fund product innovation and enhance market positioning. Safe Harbor is focusing on four product categories—Protects, Lends, Enables, and Connects—to improve the cannabis business ecosystem, with plans to offer banking services to cannabis employees and develop an earned wage access program.

More about SHF Holdings

SHF Holdings, Inc., operating as Safe Harbor, is a company focused on providing compliant banking solutions to the cannabis industry. Based in Colorado, Safe Harbor has been a pioneer in addressing the banking challenges faced by cannabis-related businesses, expanding its services to include loan origination and participation. The company operates in 41 states and territories, leveraging a compliance-first model to support the integrity of cannabis businesses’ access to the US banking system.

data.title: Hotels de Paris Judicial Recovery Progress and Strategic Plans
data.description:
An announcement from Hotels de Paris ( (FR:HDP) ) is now available.

Hotels de Paris is undergoing a judicial recovery process, with an observation period expected to conclude by April 2025. The Paris Economic Activities Court’s Judicial Administrator has initiated a call for tenders for the adoption of sale plans, receiving 171 offers. A hearing is anticipated for March 2025 to decide on the continuation of the observation period. The company is exploring options to repay its debts, including hotel sales and financial partnerships, while remaining committed to maintaining operations and safeguarding stakeholder interests.

More about Hotels de Paris

data.title: Lagardère SCA Announces Key Resolutions for Upcoming General Meeting
data.description:
The latest update is out from Lagardere SCA ( (FR:MMB) ).

Lagardère SCA has announced the details of its upcoming Combined General Meeting scheduled for 29 April 2025. The meeting will cover several key resolutions, including the approval of the 2024 financial statements, a dividend distribution of €0.67 per share, and the appointment of new independent directors. The meeting will also address the renewal of financial authorizations and updates to the company’s articles of association. These developments are significant for stakeholders as they reflect the company’s strategic direction and governance priorities.

More about Lagardere SCA

Created in 1992, Lagardère is an international group operating in over 45 countries, employing more than 33,000 people, and generating revenue of €8,924 million in 2024. The company focuses on two main divisions: Lagardère Publishing, which includes books, partworks, board games, and premium stationery, and Lagardère Travel Retail, which covers travel essentials, duty-free and fashion, and foodservice. Additionally, Lagardère’s business scope includes Lagardère News, Lagardère Radio, Lagardère Live Entertainment, and Lagardère Paris Racing. Lagardère shares are listed on Euronext Paris.

Average Trading Volume: 1,343

Current Market Cap: €2.85B

data.title: Piovan S.p.A. Reports Stable 2024 Financial Performance Amid Global Expansion
data.description:
The latest update is out from Piovan SpA ( (IT:PVN) ).

Piovan S.p.A. reported consolidated revenues of €571.8 million for 2024, with an adjusted EBITDA of €78.5 million, maintaining a stable financial performance despite a challenging macroeconomic environment. The company continues to strengthen its global leadership through strategic acquisitions and expansions, particularly in India and China, which are expected to support future growth and market share gains.

More about Piovan SpA

Piovan S.p.A. operates in the industrial machinery sector, focusing on the production of automation systems for the storage, transport, and processing of plastics. The company has a strong market presence globally, with significant operations in China, India, and Europe, and emphasizes innovation and customer-centric solutions.

data.title: Olidata S.p.A. Announces Board Expansion Plans
data.description:
Olidata S.p.A. ( (IT:OLI) ) has issued an announcement.

Olidata S.p.A. has announced the availability of candidates for the expansion of its Board of Directors, as proposed by shareholder Antarees S.r.l. The upcoming ordinary shareholders’ meeting will address increasing the number of directors from five to nine, appointing four new directors, and determining their compensation. This move is likely to impact the company’s governance structure and could influence its strategic direction and market positioning.

More about Olidata S.p.A.

Olidata S.p.A. is a leading System Integrator in the IT sector in Italy, listed on the Euronext Milan market. The company focuses on integrating IT systems and solutions, catering to various technological needs in the market.

data.title: Agnico Eagle Expands Stake in Cartier Resources
data.description:
Agnico Eagle ( (TSE:AEM) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 20, 2025, Agnico Eagle Mines Limited announced an additional investment in Cartier Resources Inc. through a non-brokered private placement, acquiring 20,770,000 units for C$2,700,100. This investment will increase Agnico Eagle’s ownership in Cartier to approximately 27.7% on an undiluted basis and 32.2% on a partially-diluted basis. The move reflects Agnico Eagle’s strategic interest in Cartier, allowing it to nominate up to three individuals to Cartier’s board and maintain significant influence over its operations.

More about Agnico Eagle

Agnico Eagle is a Canadian-based senior gold mining company and the third largest gold producer globally, with operations in Canada, Australia, Finland, and Mexico. The company is recognized for its sustainability practices and has a history of creating shareholder value, having declared a cash dividend annually since 1983.

YTD Price Performance: 35.44%
